label: Top link
summary: The "^ Top" back-to-top link; instant jump, no smooth scroll.
era: The "^ Top" link sprinkled through every long FAQ, back when pages were tall and scroll wheels were optional.

classes.name: rs-top
classes.role: the back-to-top link idiom; jumps instantly

a11y: A plain in-page link; href="#top" falls back to the document top natively. The jump is instant, smooth scrolling is not used.
